nasb.text: For every tenth part of herd or flock, whatever passes under the rod, the tenth one shall be holy to the Lord.

esv.text: And every tithe of herds and flocks, every tenth animal of all that pass under the herdsman’s staff, shall be holy to the Lord.

cnv.text: 牛群和羊群的十分之一，就是一切從牧人杖下經過的，每第十隻都是歸耶和華為聖的。

ccb.text: 至于牛羊，要让它们从牧人的杖下经过，每数十只，第十只属于耶和华，是圣物。
